onboarding_sign_in: Already have an account? Sign in
onboarding_slide_1_body: Your all-in-one app for fast, reliable rides wherever you need to go.
onboarding_slide_2_body: Pick pickup and dropoff on the map, choose your ride, and confirm with one tap.
onboarding_slide_3_body: Follow your driver live on the map with route preview and real-time ETA updates.
onboarding_slide_4_body: Manage your balance, review past trips and orders, and stay notified along the way.
auth_choice_title: How would you like to continue?
auth_choice_subtitle: Create a new account or sign in to pick up where you left off.
auth_choice_sign_up_hint: New to Nokta? Set up your profile in seconds.
auth_choice_sign_in_hint: Return with your email and password.
auth_choice_legal: By continuing you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy (demo).
register_subtitle: Enter your details to start riding with Nokta.
register_hint: Demo: any valid email and password (6+ chars) work.
register_has_account: Already have an account? Sign in
login_subtitle: Sign in to continue your journey
login_hint: Use any email and password for demo
forgot_password_subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot_password_hint: Demo: any valid email address works.
forgot_password_sent_subtitle: If an account exists for that email, you'll receive reset instructions shortly.
register_terms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
register_terms_required: Please accept the terms to continue
